internalNotes: Audited against official SimplyCLICK product page, SimplyCLICK terms booklet dated 1 Sep 2025, and SBI Card customer notices on 2026-06-08.
The current official partner set foregrounded by SBI Card includes Apollo 24X7, BookMyShow, Cleartrip, Dominos, IGP, Myntra, Netmeds, and Yatra for 10X Reward Points.

As per customer notice, 10X Reward Points on Swiggy were revised to 5X effective 1 Apr 2025; the card data therefore keeps the rewards row generic to exclusive partners and excludes Swiggy from the 10X note.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
